analysis.summary: The technician connected to a client computer, logged in, and proceeded to install Google Chrome Remote Desktop. They navigated to the Chrome Remote Desktop website, downloaded and installed the necessary extension and host application, and configured remote connections for the computer named LAPTOP-M9Q997L7, including setting a PIN.

Downloaded and installed the Chrome Remote Desktop browser extension and host application.

Closed the Chrome browser and refreshed the desktop.
